name: Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Cheesecake
24 Ounces cream cheese
1 Cup sugar
1/4 Cup brown sugar
16 Ounces pumpkin
2 eggs
2/3 Cup evaporated milk
2 Tablespoons cornstarch
1 1/4 Teaspoons cinnamon
1/2 Teaspoon nutmeg
Topping
2 Cups sour cream, room temperature
1/3 Cup sugar
1 Teaspoon vanilla
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine crust ingredients and press into a 9-inch springform pan, extending up the sides by 1 inch.
Bake for 6 minutes; do not brown. Cool.
Beat together cream cheese, sugars, eggs, pumpkin, evaporated milk, cornstarch, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Pour batter into crust and bake for 55-60 minutes.
Combine topping ingredients and spread over cheesecake.
Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
Cool and remove sides from pan. Chill for several hours or overnight.
